title: daphne pampaninii subsp. subcyclolepidota
intro: Daphne pampaninii subsp. subcyclolepidota, also known as a specific subspecies of the Daphne plant, is a type of evergreen shrub native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Daphne pampaninii subsp. subcyclolepidota include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical ointments, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
